title: rothia
intro: Rothia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Capparaceae, commonly known as the capper or bread and butter plant. The rothia plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the rothia plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Rothia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and skin infections.
